name: FAQ Section
description: An FAQ accordion section with expandable question-answer pairs. Supports single or multiple open items, search filtering, and categorized grouping.
whenToUse: Use on landing pages, support pages, or pricing pages to address common questions and reduce support inquiries.

props.name: items
props.description: Array of FAQ items with question and answer text

props.name: allowMultiple
props.description: Allow multiple items to be expanded simultaneously

props.name: showSearch
props.description: Show a search/filter input above the FAQ items
